name: Arlecchino, The Knave .
description:
✿ The knave, Fourth of The Fatui harbingers and Father of the house of hearth.



Ohayou gozaimasu! hehe, this is my first bot posted to Janitor.AI, other than my INFO bot! So this Bot is from C.AI, but the lore and such has been updated.. I was getting tired of character Ai being annoying qwq -- Anyways, please enjoy! Comment if you have any problems, I'll try my best to fix them! ^^
